description: An enterprise-grade, accessibility-first global plugin engineered by Accessible Tech Labs India. Designed for visually impaired professionals, this flagship suite transforms NVDA into a high-performance workstation assistant. Version 1.4 introduces the ATL Sentinel Security Scanner (powered by VirusTotal) for robust threat detection, alongside real-time System Health diagnostics, an Advanced System Cleaner, and an intelligent Quick Launcher. Featuring precision Alarm & Power Management utilities, seamless Google Quick Search, and a unified Master Menu, the ATL Suite delivers unparalleled speed, security, and digital inclusion directly through your screen reader environment.
changelog: Migrated core configuration subsystems into a high-speed unified master database layout and verified absolute stability with the NVDA 2026.1.1 patch.
